title: More Item Craftability
description: Allows players to craft items that could not be crafted in survival Minecraft.
body:
Adds crafting recipes for item such as:

- Totems
- Enchanted Golden Apples
- Every Horse Armor
- Elytra
- Every Piece of Chainmail Armor
- Saddle
- Trident
- Dragon Egg
- Vines
- Glowing Vines
- GlowStone
- All Mushroom blocks including the stem
- Zombie Head
- Cobwebs
- Shroom Lights
- End Frames
- Name Tags
- Spawners
- Skeleton Spawn Egg
- Creeper Spawn Egg
- Spider Spawn Egg
- Zombie Spawn Egg
- Crying Obsidian
- Glowing Ink
- String
- Dragon Egg
